faqs.question: What spider species are most common in North Bergen, NJ?
faqs.answer: North Bergen commonly sees house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and jumping spiders. Occasionally, brown recluse and black widow spiders may be found in basements, garages, or storage areas. Our technicians are trained to identify and safely remove all spider species found in Hudson County.
